query:
SELECT 
  id,
  leadId,
  corretorId,
  dataFollowUp,
  status,
  DATE(dataFollowUp) as data_apenas,
  TIME(dataFollowUp) as hora_apenas,
  NOW() as agora_servidor,
  CURDATE() as data_hoje_servidor
FROM follow_ups
WHERE corretorId = 6
ORDER BY id DESC
LIMIT 1;
